sets.title: Control Register Implementation Notice
sets.passage_with_blanks:
To: Regional Managers
From: Prism Semiconductor Operations Office
Subject: battery storage commissioning Control Update

Following the latest internal audit, the company will ___1___ a revised control register for all projects associated with battery storage commissioning. The register will apply to active workstreams ___2___ managers can demonstrate that a local regulation requires a different approval sequence. During the transition, department leads are responsible for ___3___ legacy notices with the signed policy so that employees do not rely on outdated portal guidance. Each manager must ___4___ a short exception report by the fifth business day of the month.

questions.question_text: Choose the best word or phrase for blank #1.
questions.explanation: The correct answer fits the sentence grammar and the passage cohesion: collocation with governance controls.

questions.question_text: Choose the best word or phrase for blank #2.
questions.explanation: The correct answer fits the sentence grammar and the passage cohesion: conditional connector.

questions.question_text: Choose the best word or phrase for blank #3.
questions.explanation: The correct answer fits the sentence grammar and the passage cohesion: parallel participial structure.

questions.question_text: Choose the best word or phrase for blank #4.
questions.explanation: The correct answer fits the sentence grammar and the passage cohesion: formal reporting collocation.
